# Extracao: transcription_pdf_M4_BasicInfoRequirementsForFinanciers

- **Fonte:** transcription_pdf_M4_BasicInfoRequirementsForFinanciers.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Every financing partner is different and some may require information that others will not. The
checklist below is a bare-minimum list of documents that you should have at the ready as you’re
reaching out to financiers.
• 	Business Overview and History
– Provide a history of the business and its challenges
– Include an explanation of why the SBA loan is needed and how it will help the
business
• 	Income Tax Returns
• 	Three years signed personal income taxes including all statements and
schedules.
• 	Three years signed business income taxes including all statements and
schedules
• 	Business Debt Schedule
• 	Interim Balance Sheet
• 	Interim Profit & Loss Statements
• 	Projected Financial Statements
Basic Information Requirements for Financiers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

– Include month to month cash flow projections, for at least a one-year period with
assumptions.
• 	Most-recent balance sheet
• 	Detailed list of leverageable assets
– Receivables
– Inventory
– Fixed Assets
• 	Property/real estate appraisal
• 	Resumes
– Include personal resumes for each principal
• 	Current balance sheet and P&L statement of business to be purchased
• 	Previous three years’ federal income tax returns of the business to be purchased
• 	Asking price with schedule of inventory, machinery and equipment, furniture and
fixtures
• 	Franchise or licensing agreements
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
